title: ISTUN Oral and Dental Health Practice and Research Center DENTSİSTÜN Started Accepting Patients
content:
ISTUN Oral and Dental Health Practice and Research Center DENTSİSTÜN Started Accepting Patients

Pazartesi

Our Oral and Dental Health Center affiliated to the Faculty of Dentistry of our university started its operations in 2024 on the E-5 highway in İstanbul Bahçelievler with the brand name "DENTISTÜN". Our center has started to accept patients with experienced expert academic staff, modern technological infrastructure, high hygiene standards, multidisciplinary integrated service understanding and university hospital assurance.

Our center, which has specialist dentists in all departments of oral and dental health; under general anesthesia and sedation, it treats anxious, child or adult patients who have communication difficulties with the dentist and applies personalized treatment plans for disabled individuals. In addition to advanced implant surgery, orthognathic surgery, prosthesis, gum treatments, orthodontics, root canal treatments, aesthetic fillings and smile design, it also provides services with personalized treatment methods in sports dentistry, using advanced imaging technology with different treatment concepts that aim to contribute to the improvement of the general health of the individual that will affect the whole health of the individual by adopting the concept of holistic dentistry.

Our center has 34 units, digital imaging systems, a general anesthesia operating room and a central sterilization unit. A playground for pediatric patients supports the treatment of pediatric patients. Our center is an educational institution as well as a health institution. For this reason, the priority of our academician dentists is to provide undergraduate, graduate and doctoral students with education opportunities above world standards; to provide theoretical training to students and to support them with practical training and to improve their skills in clinical processes.

Departments Provided Service

Oral, Dental and Maxillofacial Surgery

Oral, Dental and Maxillofacial Radiology

Pediatric Dentistry

Endodontics

Orthodontics

Periodontology

Prosthodontics

Restorative Dental Treatment
